name: Honey-Lavendar Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first four ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Whisk sugar and eggs in a large bowl until light lemon color; stir in next three to four ingredients.
3. Sift dry ingredients over egg mixture. Fold until dough is just combined.
4. Follow steps 3 and 4 in Lemon-Anise Biscotti recipe.
5. Some made with chocolate chips and pecans, which went well. A recipe for this will be posted later.
